# NATS Metrics Receiver

The NATS Metrics Receiver collects metrics from a NATS server by querying its built-in HTTP monitoring endpoints. It scrapes metrics from the following endpoints:

- `/varz` — Server statistics (connections, messages, bytes, CPU, memory, etc.)
- `/connz` — Client connection counts
- `/jsz` — JetStream statistics (streams, consumers, messages, storage)
- `/accstatz` — Per-account statistics (connections, messages, bytes per account)

## Prerequisites

The NATS server must have monitoring enabled. Start the NATS server with the `-m` or `--http_port` flag:

```sh
nats-server -m 8222
```

Or in the NATS server configuration file:

```
http_port: 8222
```

## Configuration

The following settings are available:

| Setting | Description | Default |
|---------|-------------|---------|
| `endpoint` | The NATS monitoring HTTP endpoint URL. | `http://localhost:8222` |
| `scrapers` | List of scrapers to enable. Valid values: `server`, `connections`, `jetstream`, `accounts`. | `["server"]` |
| `collection_interval` | How often to collect metrics. | `10s` |

The receiver also supports all standard [HTTP client settings](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector/blob/main/config/confighttp/README.md) for TLS, authentication, and proxy configuration.

### Example Configuration

```yaml
receivers:
  natsmetrics:
    endpoint: http://localhost:8222
    scrapers:
      - server
      - connections
      - jetstream
      - accounts
    collection_interval: 30s

service:
  pipelines:
    metrics:
      receivers: [natsmetrics]
      exporters: [otlp]
```

### TLS Configuration

```yaml
receivers:
  natsmetrics:
    endpoint: https://nats-server:8222
    tls:
      ca_file: /path/to/ca.crt
      cert_file: /path/to/client.crt
      key_file: /path/to/client.key
    scrapers:
      - server
```

## Scrapers

### server

Collects general server statistics from the `/varz` endpoint.

| Metric | Description | Unit | Type |
|--------|-------------|------|------|
| `nats.server.connections` | Current active client connections | `{connections}` | Gauge |
| `nats.server.connections.total` | Total connections since server start | `{connections}` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.server.subscriptions` | Active subscriptions | `{subscriptions}` | Gauge |
| `nats.server.messages.received` | Total messages received since server start | `{messages}` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.server.messages.sent` | Total messages sent since server start | `{messages}` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.server.bytes.received` | Total bytes received since server start | `By` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.server.bytes.sent` | Total bytes sent since server start | `By` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.server.memory` | Memory used by the server process | `By` | Gauge |
| `nats.server.cpu` | CPU usage (0–100) | `%` | Gauge |
| `nats.server.slow_consumers` | Slow consumer events | `{consumers}` | Gauge |
| `nats.server.routes` | Active cluster routes | `{routes}` | Gauge |
| `nats.server.leaf_nodes` | Active leaf node connections | `{leaf_nodes}` | Gauge |
| `nats.server.max_connections` | Maximum allowed connections | `{connections}` | Gauge |

### connections

Collects connection count from the `/connz` endpoint.

| Metric | Description | Unit | Type |
|--------|-------------|------|------|
| `nats.connection.count` | Active client connections | `{connections}` | Gauge |

### jetstream

Collects JetStream metrics from the `/jsz` endpoint. Only available when JetStream is enabled.

| Metric | Description | Unit | Type |
|--------|-------------|------|------|
| `nats.jetstream.streams` | Number of JetStream streams | `{streams}` | Gauge |
| `nats.jetstream.consumers` | Number of JetStream consumers | `{consumers}` | Gauge |
| `nats.jetstream.messages` | Total messages stored in JetStream | `{messages}` | Gauge |
| `nats.jetstream.bytes` | Total bytes stored in JetStream | `By` | Gauge |
| `nats.jetstream.api.calls` | Total JetStream API calls since start | `{calls}` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.jetstream.api.errors` | Total JetStream API errors since start | `{errors}` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.jetstream.memory.reserved` | Memory reserved by JetStream | `By` | Gauge |
| `nats.jetstream.storage.reserved` | Disk storage reserved by JetStream | `By` | Gauge |

### accounts

Collects per-account statistics from the `/accstatz` endpoint. Only available when NATS accounts are configured.

All metrics include the `account` attribute with the account ID.

| Metric | Description | Unit | Type |
|--------|-------------|------|------|
| `nats.account.connections` | Active connections for the account | `{connections}` | Gauge |
| `nats.account.subscriptions` | Active subscriptions for the account | `{subscriptions}` | Gauge |
| `nats.account.leaf_nodes` | Active leaf nodes for the account | `{leaf_nodes}` | Gauge |
| `nats.account.messages.sent` | Total messages sent by the account | `{messages}` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.account.messages.received` | Total messages received by the account | `{messages}` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.account.bytes.sent` | Total bytes sent by the account | `By` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.account.bytes.received` | Total bytes received by the account | `By` | Sum (Monotonic) |
| `nats.account.slow_consumers` | Slow consumer events for the account | `{consumers}` | Gauge |
